steps.title: Identify the time reference
steps.content: The phrase “nearly 150 years ago” is the key signal — it establishes that Van Gogh's action occurred in the past.

steps.title: Match the verb tense to the past time reference
steps.content:
”Completed” is simple past tense, the only form that matches the past time reference “nearly 150 years ago.”

Present and future tenses cannot describe an event that happened in the distant past.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
